hero.title: ENLIST. RESIST.
hero.subtitle: A devastated world. Lethal machines. One option: survive.

gameplay.title: AN EXTRACTION ADVENTURE
gameplay.subtitle: ARC Raiders blends the tension from extraction shooters with atmospheric adventure settings.

extraction.title: Extraction
extraction.description: Venture onto the surface, scavenge valuable resources, and extract before the machines find you.

world.title: Immersive World
world.description: A post-apocalyptic world built with Unreal Engine 5, where Italy's history blends with space infrastructure.

customization.title: Customization
customization.description: Shape your Raider with total freedom. Identity, playstyle, and equipment your way.

crossplay.title: Cross-Platform
crossplay.description: Play with your squad on PlayStation, Xbox, and PC. Connect, collaborate, and compete anywhere.

machines.title: ARC MACHINES
machines.subtitle: Lethal mechanical threats ruling the surface. Know your enemy.

drone.name: Swarm Drone
drone.description: Small but lethal. Attack in groups and are hard to dodge.

titan.name: Mechanical Titan
titan.description: Steel giants that destroy everything in their path. Avoid their gaze.

turbine.name: ARC Turbine
turbine.description: Operates in air and ground. Collects particles and is highly dangerous.

scout.name: ARC Scout
scout.description: Reconnaissance and surveillance. If it detects you, more will come.

lore.title: YEAR 2180
lore.subtitle: THE RESISTANCE BEGINS IN SPERANZA
lore.story: In the Rust Belt, after a decade of hard fighting, the first wave of ARC was eventually held back—but not for long. Within years, ARC returned with a vengeance. Survivors were forced underground, into the makeshift community of Speranza. But survival is no easy task. Resources are limited, conflicts are endless, and competition for survival is fierce.
lore.quote: True survival means risking the surface to recover supplies.
lore.hint: What are you willing to risk to get what you want?

maps.title: MAP CONDITIONS
maps.subtitle: The world changes. Adapt or die.

social.title: JOIN THE RESISTANCE
social.subtitle: Connect with thousands of Raiders worldwide.

platforms.title: AVAILABLE NOW
platforms.subtitle: Choose your platform and join the fight.
